## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly GTM (Go-To-Market) sync to discuss marketing initiatives, content strategy, and team updates.](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implementing an account tiering system in HubSpot for targeted outreach](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Expanding content creation efforts, focusing on workshop clips and social media amplification](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Exploring Circle as a platform for hosting and managing member-exclusive content](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Addressing team access issues and workflow improvements for contractors](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Account Tiering System

  - [Developing a tiering system to prioritize accounts for outreach](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Tier 1 focused on high-touch, manual work by Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Using Clay for company enrichment and qualification](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Integrating workshop attendee data and firmographic information](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Goal: Understand which marketing activities drive the most value](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

### Content Creation and Distribution

  - [Creating 40-50 clips from workshop content for 6-8 week distribution](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Leveraging influencer posts for social amplification](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Exploring different content lanes: standard high-quality cutdowns, search-optimized clips, and potentially a separate channel for more experimental content](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Discussing hook strategies and team feedback on content appeal](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Circle Platform for Content Hosting

  - [Considering Circle as a solution for hosting member-exclusive content](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Exploring headless mode for custom integration with existing website](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Aiming to create a strong hook for non-members to sign up](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Maintaining current design aesthetic while implementing new features](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

### Team Collaboration and Workflow

  - [Addressing access issues for contractors (Rafid and Edin) to Notion and other platforms](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)
  - [Discussing the potential of bringing in additional support for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
  - [Streamlining communication and file sharing through dedicated Notion pages](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Offering ghostwriting services to directors for consistent social presence](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Coordinating posts to promote upcoming workshops](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Experimenting with post frequency and timing, especially for shorts on various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/XEpkxrZrXxoZz4dAY2yf-zGaXjXVb-2L?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

## Next Steps
